statement: In every magma, Equation 1948 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 900 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0805
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op z w)))
